history.text: Baptism of Poland"Mieszko accepted Roman Catholicism via Bohemia in 966. A missionary bishopric direct.
The Kingdom of Poland emerged, giving the area a defined monarchical state structure.
Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth appears in Poland's historical record.
Second Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Government-in-exile appears in Poland's historical record.
People's Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Third Republic introduced a new form of state rule.

worthSeeing.title: Krakow Old Town:
worthSeeing.text: Royal castle, cathedral and Jewish Kazimierz district in a UNESCO old town.

worthSeeing.title: Warsaw Rebuilt:
worthSeeing.text: A capital that was 90% destroyed in WWII, meticulously reconstructed to UNESCO standard.

worthSeeing.title: Tatra Mountains:
worthSeeing.text: The highest range in the Carpathians, with Zakopane as Poland's mountain capital.
